arts.ttl: Gallery: All the best photos from Palace v Stockport
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have got their 2024/25 FA Cup campaign underway by hosting Stockport County at Selhurst Park, here are some of the best snaps from the clash!

arts.ttl: Team news: Five changes for Palace ahead of Stockport
arts.sum: Palace have named a strong side to face Stockport County in the FA Cup third round, with changes all across the park.

arts.ttl: Live Blog: Crystal Palace v Stockport County
arts.sum: Crystal Palace's 2024/25 Emirates FA Cup journey begins this afternoon against Stockport County – enjoy LIVE updates from Selhurst Park below!

arts.ttl: Liverpool have now made transfer move which looks like terrible news for Crystal Palace - opinion
Players to wear new back-of-shirt ‘PALACE’ font
arts.sum: Crystal Palace players will wear a new font for the names and numbers on the back of their shirts today, titled ‘PALACE’.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace man’s transfer preference emerges amid Coventry City pursuit
arts.sum: Coventry City target Rob Holding is keen to try his luck in the MLS as a Crystal Palace… The post Crystal Palace man’s transfer preference emerges amid Coventry City pursuit appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Romain Esse to Crystal Palace, Woyo Coulibaly to Leicester, Philip Billing to Napoli
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Romain Esse to Crystal Palace, Woyo Coulibaly to Leicester City and Philip Billing to Napoli.

arts.ttl: Glasner discusses Riad recovery ahead of Stockport cup test
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says defender Chadi Riad is “really progressing” and could potentially be involved in Sunday’s FA Cup third round tie against Stockport County.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace closing in on Romain Esse deal after Millwall talks
arts.sum: Eagles set to land highly-rated youngster this month

arts.ttl: Go inside Palace's pre-FA Cup training
arts.sum: It's FA Cup third-round weekend at last, and as Crystal Palace get set to begin their 2024/25 Cup journey at home to Stockport County on Sunday afternoon, preparations are in full swing in South London.
